Bash(python3 << 'PYTHON_SCRIPT'
import json

notebook_path = r"C:\\Users\\Satej Raste\\Downloads\\Masai_Learning_Material\\krishirakshak-project\\KrishiRakshak_Demo.ipynb"

with open\(notebook_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    notebook = json.load\(f\)

# Print total cell count and metadata
print\(f"Total cells: {len\(notebook['cells']\)}"\)
print\(f"Notebook metadata: {notebook.get\('metadata', {}\)}"\)
print\("\\n" + "="*80 + "\\n"\)

# Print each cell with its index
for i, cell in enumerate\(notebook['cells']\):
    print\(f"CELL {i}: {cell['cell_type'].upper\(\)}"\)
    print\("-" * 80\)
    
    if cell['cell_type'] == 'code':
        # For code cells, print the source
        source = cell['source']
        if isinstance\(source, list\):
            source = ''.join\(source\)
        print\(source\)
    elif cell['cell_type'] == 'markdown':
        # For markdown cells, print the source
        source = cell['source']
        if isinstance\(source, list\):
            source = ''.join\(source\)
        print\(source\)
    
    print\("\\n" + "="*80 + "\\n"\)
PYTHON_SCRIPT)

import json
import sys

# Set UTF-8 encoding for stdout
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)

notebook_path = r"C:\\Users\\Satej Raste\\Downloads\\Masai_Learning_Material\\krishirakshak-project\\KrishiRakshak_Demo.ipynb"

with open\(notebook_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    notebook = json.load\(f\)

# Print total cell count and metadata
print\(f"Total cells: {len\(notebook['cells']\)}"\)
print\(f"Notebook metadata keys: {list\(notebook.get\('metadata', {}\).keys\(\)\)}"\)
print\("\\n" + "="*80 + "\\n"\)

# Print each cell with its index
for i, cell in enumerate\(notebook['cells']\):
    print\(f"CELL {i}: {cell['cell_type'].upper\(\)}"\)
    print\("-" * 80\)
    
    if cell['cell_type'] == 'code':
        # For code cells, print the source
        source = cell['source']
        if isinstance\(source, list\):
            source = ''.join\(source\)
        print\(source\)
    elif cell['cell_type'] == 'markdown':
        # For markdown cells, print the source
        source = cell['source']
        if isinstance\(source, list\):
            source = ''.join\(source\)
        print\(source\)
    
    print\("\\n" + "="*80 + "\\n"\)

import json

import json, sys

with open\('C:/Users/Satej Raste/Downloads/Masai_Learning_Material/krishirakshak-project/KrishiRakshak_Demo.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)
cells = nb['cells']
for i in [8,9,10,11,13,14,15,16,18,19,21,22,24,26,27,29,31,33,34,36,38,39,41,42,43,45,46]:
    src = ''.join\(cells[i]['source']\)
    out = src.encode\('ascii','replace'\).decode\('ascii'\)
    sys.stdout.write\(f'=== CELL {i} ===\\n{out}\\n\\n'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json, sys

with open\('C:/Users/Satej Raste/Downloads/Masai_Learning_Material/krishirakshak-project/KrishiRakshak_Demo.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)
cells = nb['cells']

# Save each cell to a temp file
import os
os.makedirs\('C:/tmp/nb_cells', exist_ok=True\)
for i, cell in enumerate\(cells\):
    src = ''.join\(cell['source']\)
    with open\(f'C:/tmp/nb_cells/cell_{i}_{cell["cell_type"]}.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as out:
        out.write\(src\)
print\(f'Saved {len\(cells\)} cells to C:/tmp/nb_cells/'\)
PYEOF)
